title: Educational Psychology for Local Authorities | Psychology Direct
description: Clear your EHCP backlog with experienced, HCPC-registered Educational Psychologists. Flexible commissioning, statutory compliance, volume capacity.

blocks.headline: Clear Your EHCP Backlog with Flexible, Statutory-Compliant EPs
blocks.subtitle: HCPC-registered EPs, no long-term contract. Volume capacity to meet 16-week timelines, experienced in LA processes, dedicated coordination. We've completed hundreds of assessments while maintaining quality.

blocks.heading: Flexible EP Support Tailored to LA Needs
blocks.subheading: Backlog clearance, ongoing partnership, or trainee support. We scale to your demand.

cards.title: EHCP Assessment Clearance
cards.description: Bulk assessments to clear backlogs and meet statutory timelines. We scale volume without compromising quality.

cards.title: Ongoing Partnership
cards.description: Long-term agreements with flexible scaling. Dedicated EPs or flexible case-by-case access — your choice.

cards.title: Trainee & Assistant EP Support

cards.description: Assessments delivered to SEND Code of Practice standards. Your template format, on-time delivery, full compliance.

cards.title: Staff Training & Development

cards.title: Multi-Agency Coordination

blocks.imageAlt: Team collaboration supporting local authority EP services
blocks.heading: Supporting LA Teams
blocks.bodyText: We work alongside your internal EP service, not as a replacement. Whether you need overflow capacity for backlog clearance, interim cover for staffing gaps, or ongoing partnership to complement your team, we flex to your needs. Your Client Manager understands LA processes and statutory deadlines.

blocks.heading: How Local Authorities Work with Psychology Direct

steps.title: Discuss Your Needs
steps.description: We understand your capacity, timelines, and volume. A senior manager explores options: backlog clearance, ongoing partnership, or hybrid model.

steps.title: Agree Terms
steps.description: Flexible options: pay-per-assessment, volume rates, or partnership contract. Fixed pricing, no hidden costs, clear transparency.

steps.title: Assessments Begin
steps.description: EPs are matched to cases and scheduled efficiently. Our Client Managers coordinate everything. You get regular progress updates.

steps.title: Reports Delivered
steps.description: All reports are 100% quality-checked to SEND Code of Practice standards. Your template format. Delivered to your timelines.

blocks.heading: LA Commissioning: Outsourcing vs. Direct Instruction

rows.col2: Case-by-case sourcing time or fixed staff costs
Weeks of advertising and vetting, or months for training
Variable by EP or salary + overhead + training
Variable quality or high but resource-constrained
You manage everything or in-house management
Weeks to source EPs; not possible with fixed staff
Depends on EP choice; consistent but limited by capacity

caseStudies.title: County Council Clears Major Backlog
caseStudies.summary: A local authority with 200+ pending EHCP assessments partnered with Psychology Direct to provide bulk assessment capacity. Backlog cleared in 18 months while maintaining quality and statutory compliance.

caseStudies.title: Full EP Service for Local Authority
caseStudies.summary: An LA outsourced a portion of their EP service to Psychology Direct, blending internal capacity with national network for consistent, high-quality provision across all their schools.

caseStudies.title: Statutory Timelines Met During Staffing Gap
caseStudies.summary: When two principal EPs left an LA simultaneously, Psychology Direct provided interim capacity to ensure EHCP assessments continued without delays.

tabs.label: Backlog Clearance
tabs.content:
Need to clear a large backlog of pending EHCP assessments? We can:

- Supply volume capacity on a pay-per-assessment basis
- Meet your statutory 16-week timelines
- Provide all EPs HCPC-registered and LA-experienced
- Deliver reports in your template format
- Scale up or down as the backlog reduces
- No long-term commitment beyond the clearing period

tabs.label: Ongoing Partnership
tabs.content:
Looking for long-term outsourced EP capacity? Options include:

- Fixed number of assessments per month
- Dedicated EP allocation if preferred
- Mix of statutory assessments and consultation
- Trainee and assistant EP support
- Volume discounts on larger contracts
- Flexible scaling as your needs change

tabs.label: Trainee & Assistant EP Development
tabs.content:
We work with LAs developing new EPs:

- Trainees and assistants gain diverse case experience
- Supervised practice across a range of SEND presentations
- CPD and professional development support
- Guidance from experienced EPs
- Real outcomes that strengthen future applications
- Access to our 1,000+ EP network for peer learning

tabs.label: Quality Assurance & Compliance
tabs.content:
Every assessment delivered meets:

- HCPC registration requirements (all EPs)
- SEND Code of Practice standards
- Your LA's report template (if provided)
- Enhanced DBS checks (all EPs)
- Professional indemnity insurance
- 100% quality assurance before delivery

faqs.question: How much does it cost to outsource assessments?
faqs.answer: Pricing is bespoke based on volume and assessment type. We offer pay-per-assessment rates, volume discounts, and partnership pricing. We always provide a detailed quote upfront with no hidden charges. Contact us with your anticipated volume for a bespoke proposal.

faqs.question: Do your EPs understand LA processes and use our templates?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our EPs work regularly with local authorities and know SEND Code of Practice requirements. We use your template or provide our own. We align with your LA's processes and systems.

faqs.question: How flexible is the arrangement? Can we scale up and down?
faqs.answer: Very flexible. Whether you need 10 assessments per month or 100, we match that. If demand drops, costs drop too. No long-term lock-in — partnership contracts available if you want stability.

faqs.question: What about trainee and assistant EP development?
faqs.answer: We actively support LAs developing new EPs. Trainees gain diverse case experience, supervision, and CPD access. We help strengthen their applications. Discuss this when you contact us.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start providing assessments?
faqs.answer: We can begin within weeks. Once terms are agreed, EPs are matched to cases and assessments scheduled. Our Client Managers coordinate everything, so your staff can focus on statutory decision-making.

faqs.question: Will the LA accept reports from your EPs?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our EPs are HCPC-registered and LA-experienced. We work to your templates and provide evidence of our vetting and quality assurance. Your authority should accept reports from registered professionals.

faqs.question: Can you handle complex cases involving multiple agencies?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're experienced in coordinating health, education, and social care assessments. Our Client Managers liaise with all agencies and ensure all perspectives are included.

faqs.question: What if an EP isn't available for a case?
faqs.answer: We have 1,000+ EPs nationwide, so availability is rarely an issue. If an EP becomes unavailable, we quickly identify a replacement without delay. We keep you informed throughout.

faqs.question: How do you ensure consistent quality across all assessments?
faqs.answer: Every report is 100% quality-checked before delivery. We verify that all statutory questions are answered, recommendations are clear, and reports meet SEND Code of Practice standards.

blocks.heading: Ready to Explore Flexible EP Commissioning?
blocks.bodyText: Backlog clearance, capacity scaling, or trainee development. We have a flexible model that fits your LA. Let's discuss your situation.
